title: Shaders & Optimization
description: A modpack balanced between beauty and performance: realistic shaders, visual improvements, and advanced optimizations for a smooth and stable experience.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afcb27664a408cb34f9756d31b5c361482bdb5f8.png)

**Shaders & Optimization** is a mod pack designed for players looking for a **visually spectacular Minecraft experience** without sacrificing performance.
It combines the best realistic shaders, graphical enhancements, and **optimization mods** to achieve a perfect balance between aesthetics and fluidity, allowing you to enjoy _vibrant worlds, dynamic lighting, and stable gameplay on low-end, mid-end, and high-end systems._

![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/397c38171c02297b8823f243d618ed3cc8c5bd18.gif)

## **💡 Improved Visuals**

Realistic shaders (**BSL, Complementary, and YoFPS**) with** Iris** and **Sodium** support.
Natural lighting, reflections, soft shadows, and balanced colorimetry.
Support for connected and emissive textures using Continuity.
Visually richer biomes and environments, with animated leaves, volumetric clouds, and realistic water.

## **🚀 Full Optimization**

**Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **FerriteCore** improve rendering, physics, and memory performance.
**Indium** ensures full compatibility between Sodium and other visual mods.
**Immediately Fast** speeds up the interface and reduces lag in menus and inventory.
**Dynamic FPS** saves resources when the game is in the background.
Presets for different computer types (low, medium, high).

## **🧩 Quality of Life and Usability**

**ModMenu** allows easy management of mods from within the game.
**AppleSkin** displays useful hunger and saturation information.
Smooth and modern interface, without sacrificing the classic Minecraft style.
Intuitive setup, ideal for both casual players and content creators.

## **🧠 Adaptive Performance**

Shaders & Optimization includes three levels of settings depending on your system:
Level Recommended Features

_Low-end_: **YoFPS or BSL Lite Shader**, 8–12 render distance, minimal particles, “Fast” graphics.

_Mid-end_: **Complementary Shader**, 16–24 render, soft shadows, normal particles, moderate effects.

_High-end_: **BSL Ultra Shader**, 32+ render, volumetric clouds, advanced reflections, dynamic shadows, depth of field.

## **🖥️ Compatibility**

Version: Minecraft 1.21+

**Loader**: Fabric Loader (recommended)

**Included Libraries**: Fabric API, Indium, Architecture (if needed)

**Operating Systems**: Windows, macOS, and Linux

Compatible with most standard textures and datapacks.
